title: Bay St. Louis 5K Run/Walk
content: Lace up your running shoes for the annual Bay St. Louis 5K! A scenic route through the community with awards, refreshments, and fun for runners and walkers of all levels.

title: Bay St. Louis Farmers Market
content: Shop fresh local produce, baked goods, crafts, and artisan products at the weekly farmers market in Bay St. Louis. Support local farmers and makers while enjoying the community atmosphere.

title: Hancock County Easter Egg Hunt
content: Bring the kids for the annual community Easter Egg Hunt! Children of all ages can search for candy-filled eggs, enjoy spring activities, and visit with the Easter Bunny.
address: Bay St. Louis City Park, MS

title: Hancock County Crawfish Boil
content: It's crawfish season! Join us for a community crawfish boil featuring pounds of fresh mudbugs, cold drinks, live music, and good times. Local cook-off competition included!

title: Bay St. Louis Spring Festival
content: Celebrate spring in Hancock County with live music, local vendors, food trucks, arts and crafts, and family activities. A beloved community tradition.

title: Bay St. Louis BBQ Festival
content: The smokers are fired up! BBQ teams compete for bragging rights while you sample the best ribs, pulled pork, brisket, and more. Live music and family fun all day.

title: Bay St. Louis Memorial Day Ceremony
content: A solemn ceremony honoring those who gave the ultimate sacrifice. Features patriotic music, guest speakers, rifle salute, and wreath laying.
address: Bay St. Louis Veterans Memorial, MS

title: Summer Concert Series — Bay St. Louis
content: Enjoy free live music every Friday evening throughout the summer! Bring a blanket or lawn chair and relax under the stars with local and regional musicians.

title: Hancock County July 4th Celebration
content: Celebrate Independence Day with patriotic festivities, live entertainment, food vendors, kids' activities, and a spectacular fireworks display at dusk. Bring lawn chairs and blankets!

title: Back to School Bash — Hancock County
content: Get ready for the new school year! Free school supplies, backpacks, haircuts, health screenings, and community resources for Hancock County families.
address: Bay St. Louis Community Center, MS

title: Bay St. Louis Art Walk
content: Explore local galleries, meet artists, and discover original artwork throughout downtown Bay St. Louis. A celebration of the vibrant arts community in Hancock County.

title: Hancock County Fair
content: The annual Hancock County Fair features carnival rides, livestock shows, live entertainment, fair food, and fun for the whole family. A week-long celebration of our community!

title: Waveland Fall Festival
content: Enjoy fall fun in Waveland with vendors, food, live music, and activities for the whole family.

title: Diamondhead Fall Festival
content: Enjoy fall fun in Diamondhead with vendors, food, live music, and activities for the whole family.

title: Bay St. Louis Fall Festival
content: Celebrate autumn in Bay St. Louis with a day of arts and crafts vendors, fall treats, live music, pumpkin decorating, and community fun.

title: Bay St. Louis Trunk or Treat
content: A safe, family-friendly Halloween event! Kids trick-or-treat from decorated car trunks, enjoy costume contests, games, and candy. Come in your best costume!
address: Bay St. Louis Community Center, MS

title: Hancock County Veterans Day Ceremony
content: Honor our veterans at the annual Hancock County Veterans Day ceremony. Features patriotic music, guest speakers, wreath laying, and recognition of local veterans.

title: Bay St. Louis Tree Lighting Ceremony
content: Join the community for the official lighting of the Bay St. Louis Christmas tree! Enjoy hot cocoa, holiday music, photos with Santa, and the magical moment when the tree lights up.

title: Bay St. Louis Christmas Parade
content: Kick off the holiday season with the annual Bay St. Louis Christmas Parade! Enjoy festive floats, marching bands, holiday performances, and a visit from Santa Claus.

title: Waveland Christmas Parade
content: Celebrate the holiday season with the Waveland Christmas Parade featuring festive floats, local schools, and a visit from Santa!

title: Diamondhead Christmas Parade
content: Celebrate the holiday season with the Diamondhead Christmas Parade featuring festive floats, local schools, and a visit from Santa!

title: New Year's Eve Celebration — Bay St. Louis
content: Ring in the New Year in Bay St. Louis! Enjoy live music, entertainment, food and drinks, and a midnight countdown to welcome 2027.
